scripts.dev: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev concurrently "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server-dev"
scripts.dev:staging: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev API_DOMAIN=api.openfront.dev concurrently "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server-dev"
scripts.dev:prod: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev API_DOMAIN=api.openfront.io concurrently "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server-dev"
scripts.tunnel: npm run build-prod && npm run start:server
scripts.agent:league-smoke:codex-cli: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=120000
scripts.agent:league-smoke:codex-cli:stepped: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=120000
scripts.agent:league-demo:render:codex-cli: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.4 AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT=medium AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=180000 --max-steps=15 --turns-per-decision-step=100 --replay-tail-turns=350 --bots=5 --nations=5 --map=Pangaea --map-size=Compact --vary-spawns
scripts.agent:league-demo:codex-cli: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.4 AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT=medium AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=180000 --max-steps=15 --turns-per-decision-step=100 --replay-tail-turns=350 --bots=5 --nations=5 --map=Pangaea --map-size=Compact --vary-spawns
scripts.agent:league-demo:planner:codex-cli: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=180000 --max-steps=3
scripts.agent:league-demo:planner:codex-medium: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.4 AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT=medium AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-league-smoke.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --runner=step-locked --scenario=actions --disable-alliance-actions --max-decision-ms=180000 --max-steps=15 --turns-per-decision-step=100 --replay-tail-turns=350 --bots=5 --nations=5 --map=Pangaea --map-size=Compact --vary-spawns
scripts.agent:closed-beta: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-demo-server.ts
scripts.agent:closed-beta:codex: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-demo-server.ts
scripts.agent:beta: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-demo-server.ts
scripts.agent:closed-beta:lan: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 AI_LEAGUE_DEMO_HOST=0.0.0.0 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-demo-server.ts
scripts.agent:closed-beta:remote: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/proxywar-remote-beta.ts
scripts.agent:closed-beta:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production GAME_ENV=dev PROXYWAR_BETA_ENABLED=true PROXYWAR_ALLOW_PRIVATE_AGENT_ENDPOINTS=false PROXYWAR_MAX_QUEUED_JOBS=1 PROXYWAR_HOUSE_AGENT_BRAIN=planner-codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-demo-server.ts
scripts.agent:benchmark:bots:full:codex-medium: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.4 AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT=medium AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-frontier-benchmark.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --full-match --runs=1 --require-wins=1 --nations=5 --bots=5 --map=Pangaea --map-size=Compact --difficulty=Easy --max-turns=90000 --write-replay
scripts.agent:benchmark:hard-nations:codex-mediu: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.4 AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT=medium AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-frontier-benchmark.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --full-match --runs=3 --require-wins=1 --nations=5 --bots=0 --map=Pangaea --map-size=Compact --difficulty=Hard --max-turns=90000 --write-replay
scripts.agent:tournament:codex-cli: cross-env GAME_ENV=dev AI_LEAGUE_LLM_PROVIDER=codex-cli AI_LEAGUE_REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_BRAIN_SUCCESS=true AI_LEAGUE_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 tsx src/scripts/ai-agent-tournament.ts --brain=planner-codex-cli --scenario=actions --runs=1
scripts.gen-maps: cd map-generator && go run . && npm run format:generated-maps
